item.title: That would explain a lot of things.
item.description: The worst part is she's right on every point.
item.dc:creator: Pentjotal

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
never been a big fan of the taste or hangovers of wine
if you play your cards right
i wonder what the heart breaking into 2 pieces represents
pretty sure that's not supposed to happen
nothin wrong with that
more power to her. farting gives you power.
dislike
toads look dirtier
i'll disgust both of you again and you'll like it
pretty much
stay out wimps!!
i'm sorry what
this did not age well
and the problem is?
mmm hmm
how can we be sure?
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Trying to do more daily dirty posts dis week to catch up on my over 3k memes I have piled up to share. enjoy!
well fudge didnt I just post dis one too. so many duplicates. that is why I do these posts tho before sorting into deviousness folder.
purdy.
yes I can.
om, I dont feel this is true anymore. Thank you Pookie :p
I have so many tshirts. all of the tshirts.
only 40%?
cuddled into bed for naps always a good time.
very important safety glasses.
om.
that and one other thing.
I miss rain.
sometimes you do wanna just be held and loved and stuffs. cuddles are always good.
I didnt. and now I am making some great friendships to remember there is better then lousy lovers in this world.
playing with my rubber duckies. and shit.
hate this shit. like just say what you want and mean and dont play fucking games. too old for that shit.
I am amazing and everyones problem now.
but its sunday so this is my exact plans. kind of. weekends are for doing dis I thought?
mhmm.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We had a super successful little secret santa! Thank you to everyone who participated. I learned a lot and look forward to doing it next year! We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "I want to dance always, to be good and not evil, and when it is all over not to have the feeling that I might have done better." - Ruth St. Denis I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Charlie was the best dog. Now every Feb 20th will be King Charles day and I will spoil every dog I see.
item.description:
I always knew this day would come but I never wanted to be without him. He had this collar from day 1, Valentine’s Day 2013. Best present I ever gave myself. I wouldn’t take it back for all the money in the world. My boy Charlie brought everything to my life. Please adopt a dog, they give you so much.
If you want to see him when he was younger. https://imgur.com/gallery/hoM3LFn
item.dc:creator: getridofTheSeaword

item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.title: Harley Quinn - Body painted myself - MCroft07
item.description: The world is particularly messy right now so I just wanted to post a bit more so that it breaks up some of the direness on our feeds. Hope it doesn't come across as spammy. Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: - I use body paint and do these in a mirror - No, it is not AI - I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. - Yes, I have read comic books in my life. No, I will not list every comic book ever existed to prove it - I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. - I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. - This is my full time thing now (yayy) - I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint - It takes between 6-12 hours each - Body painting myself is my hobby/passion - I do own clothes - It doesn’t tickle - “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. - I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. - I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer - I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. - The paint isn’t edible (gross) - I've been painting myself for 16 years. - The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size - No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) - No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) - If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube - I paint them live on twitch - I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. - I am cringe but I am free - My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan - I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. - The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. - The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). - I use body paint. - It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. - I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first - I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. - I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. - I am English, not American. - I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) - I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. - Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! - “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life - It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! - If you're still here I’m about to get a biscoff chocolate - I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. - I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. - I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. - I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway. - If you see gross comments please may you downvote them? It makes it a bit more of a pleasant experience when I come back to see the nice imgurians. Generally if I get too many gross comments on a platform I just stop reading them and it's a shame because I like interacting with people who are supportive. Thank you in advance x
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: My friend loves their dog, but he just said "i love my dog but this mf gotta pay rent" I giggled.
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Health insurance companies are parasites
item.description:
Everyone at my friend's company has been without health insurance coverage for over three weeks because Blue Cross Blue Shield fucked up their payment records
Assuming BCBS ever fixes their mistake and restores coverage, do you think they'll pay back the premium for the month of benefits they didn't provide? And if they do, they certainly aren't going to compensate the employees who were forced to buy prescriptions out of pocket and whose families haven't been able to afford to see a doctor for a month. They are parasites, whose greed causes incalculable harm to our society. I don't know what the solution is, but something has to change.
item.dc:creator: FailureTowne

item.title: Dump #287
item.description:
1 Hey, y’all! I’m Ashleigh (they/them) and I post memes.
2 Special hello to my fellow meme dealers and user sub browsers. Also, hey if you gay!
3 Reminder that trolling/harrassing comments will be muted and reported to Imgur with screenshots.
4
5
6 I feel very passionately about her, okay?!?
7 This is easier than you think.
8
9 This also happens in the summer where I’m from by way of INTENSE humidity.
10 It takes several days of processing.
11
12 This show is bananas!
13 That bitch is due every month!
14 I mean, I’m not for shaming in general, but like I can’t imagine having that man as an ex.
15 Hamburger Help Me: Stir My Stroganoff ™️
16
17
18
19
20
21 I absolutely love miniatures and have been following a group that makes them for a while now. Look how tiny ???
22
23
24
25 Going to Flavortown, Baby!
26 It’s always morally correct to punch Nazis.
27 Also, RIP Howie the Crab
28 It makes the sex so much better.
29 My eyeeeeeeeeees.
30 ???
31 Unbearable horniness and yearning are, at times, quite inconvenient.
32
33
34 Wanna thank ya motha for a butt like that.
35 I gave away free merch in the meme wars.
36
37
38
39
40 Me when I go out in nature.
41 Also Doechii is the best (in case you want context for the meme)
42 YEARNING
43 SO TINY
44
45
46
47
48
49
50

item.title: Litterbox Meme Monday! [OC]
item.description:
Introducing MEME MONDAY! Every week I'm going to recreate a meme in Litterbox style! This week is "Monkey Puppet Looking Away Meme"! I've included blank versions for you to make your own at the end!
Blank #1
Blank #2
